message:
feat(ars): add hierarchical token-bucket blast radius controller

831-line module implementing swarm-wide rate limiting for ARS reflex
execution to prevent a subtly-wrong reflex from destroying 200 agents
simultaneously:

- Three-tier token-bucket hierarchy: swarm global (e.g., 20 execs/min),
  per-cluster (e.g., 10 execs/min), per-reflex (e.g., 5 execs/min)
- All three tiers must have tokens available for execution to proceed;
  excess requests fall back to LLM processing
- Maturity tiers: Incubating (strict limits) → Graduated (relaxed) →
  Veteran (most permissive) based on accumulated successful executions
  without drift detection
- Token refill uses classic token-bucket algorithm with configurable
  refill rate and burst capacity per tier
- Thread-safe design using atomic operations for hot-path token checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
